videoSnippet.title: "Immortal-Like!" || David Navara vs Nodirbek Yakubboev || Prague Chess Festival 2026

Navara, David (2628) - Yakubboev, Nodirbek (2691) 
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.03.01
08 Catalan, closed, 7.Qc2

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.g3 d5 4.Bg2 Be7 5.Nf3 O-O 6.O-O Nbd7 7.Qc2 a5 8.Bg5 h6 9.Bxf6 Nxf6 10.Nc3 c6 11.Rfd1 b6 12.e4 dxc4 13.Ne5 Bb7 14.Nxc4 b5 15.Ne3 Rc8 16.Rac1 Qb6 17.e5 Nd5 18.Ne4 Nb4 19.Qe2 Nxa2 20.Ra1 Nb4 21.Nf6+ Bxf6 22.exf6 Qd8 23.fxg7 Kxg7 24.Ng4 Ra8 25.Qe5+ f6 26.Qxe6 Bc8 27.Qe2 Qd6 28.Ne3 Bd7 29.d5 c5 30.Qxb5 Nc2 31.Qc6 Qe7 32.Qc7 Nxe3 33.d6 Qe6 34.Re1 Ra6 35.Rad1 Qg4 36.h3 Qa4 37.b3 Qxb3 38.Qxd7+ Rf7 39.Qxf7+ Kxf7 40.d7 Nxg2 41.Re7+ Kxe7 42.d8=Q+ Kf7 43.Rd7+ Kg6 44.Qe8+ Kg5 45.Qe4 f5 46.Rg7+ Rg6 47.h4+ Kf6 48.Qe7#

judgment.comment: Checkmate is now unavoidable. Ke6 was best.
